questions.question: How do patients confirm their appointments?
questions.answer: Patients can confirm appointments with a simple tap in text messages or email notifications. They can also request rescheduling through the same message. For voice calls, patients can confirm by pressing a button on their keypad. All confirmations are instantly updated in your practice management software.

questions.question: Can we customize the timing of reminders?
questions.answer: Absolutely. You can set multiple reminders at different intervals (e.g., 1 week, 2 days, and 2 hours before appointments). You can also customize timing based on appointment type, with longer lead times for surgical procedures and shorter for routine hygiene visits.

questions.question: How does the system handle patients who don't respond?
questions.answer: The system automatically escalates through communication channels if patients don't respond. For example, if a text message isn't confirmed, the system can send an email, and then initiate a voice call. You can also configure alerts for staff to follow up personally with non-responsive patients.

questions.question: Can we personalize the reminder messages?
questions.answer: Yes, all message templates are fully customizable. You can include patient names, appointment details, provider names, pre-appointment instructions, and your practice branding. Different appointment types can have different templates, and you can create seasonal variations or special messages.

questions.question: What about patients without mobile phones or email?
questions.answer: The system maintains a patient communication preference database. For patients without digital access, the system can still generate automated voice calls to landlines. You can also mark certain patients for manual reminders only, and the system will alert your staff to call these patients directly.

reviews.name: Dr. Thomas Reynolds
reviews.comment: Before implementing this reminder system, our no-show rate was around 18%. Now it's consistently below 4%. The automated recalls have also brought back dozens of patients who had fallen out of their regular hygiene schedule. The ROI has been incredible.

reviews.name: Maria Gonzalez
reviews.comment: My front desk team used to spend at least 2 hours daily making reminder calls. Now that time is freed up for more valuable patient interactions. Patients appreciate the text reminders, and the two-way messaging feature has made rescheduling so much easier for everyone.

reviews.name: Dr. Sarah Kim
reviews.comment: The family grouping feature is perfect for our pediatric practice. Parents love getting coordinated reminders when multiple children have back-to-back appointments. The customizable templates also let us use child-friendly language that matches our practice personality.
